about.title: About LinkSphere
about.mission.title: Our Mission
about.mission.text: LinkSphere is a digital visibility platform that allows individuals and businesses to own their place in the digital universe. We're building a permanent, global digital monument where your presence lasts forever.
about.howItWorks.title: How It Works
about.howItWorks.text: Choose from 1,000,000 slots on our 3D sphere. Each slot represents a permanent digital placement that you can customize with your branding, links, and message.
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.whatIsSlot.a: A slot is a permanent digital space on our 3D sphere. Each slot can be customized with your logo, title, description, and a link to your website or project.
faq.howLong.q: How long do I own a slot?
faq.howLong.a: Slots are owned permanently. Once you purchase a slot, it's yours forever with no renewal fees.
faq.canEdit.q: Can I edit my slot after purchase?
faq.canEdit.a: Yes! You can update your slot's content anytime through your dashboard. Changes are subject to our content guidelines.
faq.refund.a: Due to the permanent nature of slot ownership, refunds are not available after purchase.
faq.payment.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.payment.a: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe. PayPal and crypto payments may be added in the future.
